ships.name: sensor-havoc
ships.description: The Class E "Battlecarrier" is a drone warship designed for flooding systems.

outfits.name: sensor-clustermissle
outfits.description: Shoots fragmenting shards, uses javelins and ship fuel

outfits.name: sensor-octopotato
outfits.description: A potato octo cannon, at the mere cost of 10 firing energy you shoot 8 potatoes

outfits.name: sensor-skystreak
outfits.description: A missle system, Works internally like a fabricator. Uses javelin missles, and ship fuel. Shoots Vertical launch SkyStreak missles (VLSM)

outfits.name: sensor-spiral
outfits.description: Spinny thing shoot spinny stars 	[Fire bombs are a one-shot weapon: each missile occupies a gun slot, and after it is fired, the slot it was in is left empty.]

outfits.name: sensor-firestream-am
outfits.description: This anti missle system shoots huge beams of accelerated streams of fire to your enemy missles Note that it will heat up your ship
